concept: Create a game where I control a character who ages or grows younger based on the environments they navigate. Futuristic areas accelerate aging, granting wisdom and experience but reducing physical capabilities; prehistoric zones reverse aging, increasing strength and agility but limiting access to knowledge and skills. The protagonist must reach a perfect age equilibrium to confront the antagonist, who manipulates time to remain perpetually in their prime. Strategic use of age-changing zones becomes necessary to develop the ideal combination of physical prowess and accumulated wisdom for each unique challenge.
